calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-27-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio for Tracy Higgins (Administrator).

Ms. Fisher-Kouadio stated that she is not aware of any opposition. The Court stated that relief under section 11854 and getting an order to the Controller to distribute to the Sisters is appropriate. The Court instructed Counsel to provide an amended order with language to the Controller to distribute pursuant to 11854. The Court granted the Petition for Amended Order (subject to receipt and review of a proposed order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
